name: trustchain
description: TrustChain — Decentralized Social Credit Network on Stellar

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "blue,green" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
